categories.name: Contact & Tag API Structure
categories.description: Differences in how contacts and tags are created, including the known contactTags endpoint bug

categories.name: Custom Field Mapping
categories.description: HubSpot property type differences vs ActiveCampaign field types (text, date, listbox, checkbox)

categories.name: List & Automation Mapping
categories.description: Differences in list management and automation triggers between the two platforms

categories.name: Deal / Opportunity Sync
categories.description: How HubSpot deals map to ActiveCampaign deals (different data models)

categories.name: Webhook & Automation Sync
categories.description: Webhook payload differences when triggering automations across platforms

mappings.notes: ActiveCampaign's POST /api/3/contactTags endpoint requires the payload wrapped in a `contactTag` object. The official docs example is ambiguous — many developers send the flat object and get a 400 error. Custom integration middleware often gets this wrong. Confirmed by developer reports 2025-2026.
mappings.fixStrategy: Wrap all contactTag payloads in {'contactTag': {...}} object. If using Zapier or Make, check that the outbound payload structure matches ActiveCampaign's expected format.

mappings.toolBValue: ActiveCampaign tag ID (numeric, referenced by 'tag' key in contactTag)
mappings.notes: Both systems use numeric tag IDs. Mapping is straightforward but requires a cross-reference table: HubSpot tag 'newsletter' (ID 12345) → ActiveCampaign tag 'Newsletter Subscribers' (ID 67890).

mappings.toolAValue: HubSpot property types: string, number, date, datetime, boolean, enumeration, phone
mappings.toolBValue: ActiveCampaign field types: text, textarea, date, datetime, dropdown, listbox, checkbox, radio, hidden, currency
mappings.notes: HubSpot enumeration → ActiveCampaign dropdown/listbox: values must be mapped individually. HubSpot boolean → ActiveCampaign checkbox: may not translate correctly. HubSpot phone → ActiveCampaign text: fine, but ActiveCampaign has no dedicated phone field type. HubSpot datetime → ActiveCampaign datetime: timezone may differ (ActiveCampaign stores in account timezone).
mappings.fixStrategy: Map HubSpot enumeration values to ActiveCampaign dropdown options explicitly. Prefer ActiveCampaign text fields for phone. Set timezone explicitly on ActiveCampaign account.

mappings.toolAValue: HubSpot list: contact added to/removed from list (webhook)
mappings.toolBValue: ActiveCampaign list: contact added to/removed from list (automation trigger)
mappings.notes: HubSpot list membership changes don't automatically trigger ActiveCampaign automations. ActiveCampaign automations trigger on list add/remove, but when syncing from HubSpot, the automation must be triggered via ActiveCampaign API's `/api/3/automation/{id}/contact/add` endpoint — not by list membership change.
mappings.fixStrategy: After syncing contact to ActiveCampaign list, explicitly trigger automation via ActiveCampaign API. Don't rely on list membership alone to start automation.

mappings.notes: ActiveCampaign has a simpler deal model than HubSpot. HubSpot deals have many standard properties (amount, dealstage, pipeline, closedate, createdate, hs_analytics_source, etc.) plus custom properties. ActiveCampaign deals have title, description, value, currency, owner, pipeline, and custom fields. Mapping HubSpot deal properties to ActiveCampaign deal fields often requires dropping less common fields.
mappings.fixStrategy: Identify must-have deal properties for sync. Map HubSpot deal amount → ActiveCampaign deal value. Map deal stage carefully — ActiveCampaign stages may differ.

errors.description: ActiveCampaign contactTags endpoint requires {'contactTag': {...}} wrapper. Flat payload produces 400 error.
errors.fixSummary: Wrap payload in 'contactTag' object. Test with single contact first.

errors.errorName: Custom Field Type Mismatch — Enumeration to Dropdown
errors.description: HubSpot enumeration values don't auto-map to ActiveCampaign dropdown options. Values silently dropped.
errors.fixSummary: Explicit option mapping for HubSpot enumeration → ActiveCampaign dropdown/listbox fields.

errors.description: HubSpot list sync doesn't trigger ActiveCampaign automations. Automation must be triggered via API.
errors.fixSummary: Call ActiveCampaign automation trigger API endpoint after list sync.

errors.description: HubSpot deal custom properties with no ActiveCampaign equivalent are silently dropped during sync.
errors.fixSummary: Audit HubSpot deal properties against ActiveCampaign fields. Document dropped fields.
